_comment: UNIFIED expert package example (rosetta PACKAGE.md v2). Serve: ./build/sgiandubh --rosetta-package <dir> <port>. Every answer cites rule+origin+evidence; everything else abstains.
_origin: document | teacher | feedback -- the manifest default; rules may override
_grounding: source text shipped with the package: enables serve-time ATTESTATION (stratum 0) with quoted spans
_strata: stratum 0=attested (assigned at serve time) / 1=certified / 2=supported (fall-through below tau; MUST be qualified on deployment queries)

canon._comment: mined template inventory; runtimes parse-or-ABSTAIN before key lookup and surface canonical+bindings (the silent-substitution defense). Reps must be SERVEABILITY-scored: visible to the key tiers and measured against the cover.

citation: human-feedback patch: The atomic mass of Helium...
